conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: Ensure the email includes the phrase "archived newspapers from 1990."
new_constraint: Avoid using any numbers in the email.
instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990. Ensure the email includes the phrase "archived newspapers from 1990." Avoid using any numbers in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Historical Newspaper Collection

Dear [Library Name] Staff,

I am writing to inquire about the availability of your historical newspaper collection.

Specifically, I am hoping to access archived newspapers from the year nineteen ninety. I am conducting research on a particular topic and believe your archives might hold the materials I need.

Could you please let me know if you have these archived newspapers from nineteen ninety available, and if so, what procedures I would need to follow to view or request copies? I would also appreciate any information regarding viewing times, access fees, or digital availability.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance with this request. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<turn|>
